data.title: 国际服制约解除决战更新特别礼物
data.summary: [Special Gift Notice] To commemorate our Final Restriction Release update, we have given out Pyroxen
data.body:
[Special Gift Notice]

To commemorate our Final Restriction Release update, we have given out Pyroxenes and Advanced Enhancement Stones as a special gift!
Check your mailbox, Sensei! 💌

➡️ https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2649270

#BlueArchive
